features: Nutrient-Rich & Sugar Free: Our greens powder combines ashwagandha, collagen, and probiotics to create a nutrient-rich blend. This superfood aids digestion and supports gut health, making it an essential addition to your daily routine.*

Powerful Greens: This powerful greens and superfood powder was formulated with probiotics to help support gut health. Ashwagandha to support brain function and help manage stress, and collagen to help protect joints.*
Easy to Enjoy: Morning Kick is as easy as taking your daily supplements. Just mix 1 scoop with 8 fluid ounces of water… and enjoy!
Tasty Flavor: The delightful strawberry lemonade flavor provides a tasty pick-me-up any time day or night — emergency or no emergency.
Helpful Information: Please note, this product features a MFG Date, this is the date the product is manufactured, NOT an expiration date. We guarantee the product for 2 years from MFG Date.
parentTitle: ROUNDHOUSE PROVISION Morning Kick, Powder Supplement for Healthy Digestion, Energy Levels, and Overall Wellness, 30 Servings
title: ROUNDHOUSE PROVISION Morning Kick, Zero Sugar Greens Superfood Powder Supplement with Ashwagandha, Collagen, Probiotics, Debloat Drink, 30 Servings (Strawberry Lemonade) by Chuck Norris
